metadata.description: ferrotorch-vision conformance fixtures. Reference: torch == 2.11.0, torchvision == 0.21.0. Inputs are small synthetic images (≤8x8) with deterministic pixel values.

fixtures.note: Total parameter count for resnet18(num_classes=10) with random init.
Total parameter count for vgg11(num_classes=10) with random init.
Seeded determinism verified in Rust test (torch RNG is independent). Placeholder only.
Constructor correctness verified by the normalize_imagenet_4x4 fixture.
Shape contract only: output must be [3,4,4]. Pixel values depend on RNG.
p=0.0 means never flips; input == output.
Shape contract only; pixel content depends on RNG.
Shape preserving; pixel content depends on RNG.
Shape preserving; pixel content depends on RNG.
p=1.0: always applies inner transform (Resize to 8x8 identity). Shape contract only.
RandomChoice picks one of two identity transforms. Shape contract only.
Output must be in [0.0, 1.0] regardless of params. Range contract only.
Smoke test: FeatureExtractor wraps a resnet18 and extracts named features. No reference output needed.
ferrotorch list_models() must include at least resnet18, resnet34, resnet50, vgg11, vgg16.
Smoke test: get_model('resnet18', false, 10) must succeed. No reference output needed.
